message:
Running command: export PATH="$PATH:/home/user/.local/bin"

PROJECT_ROOT="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526"
SOC_CONFIG="$PROJECT_ROOT/config/soc_config.yaml"
PDK_ROOT="/nc/apps/pdk"
NC_LIB_ROOT="$PROJECT_ROOT/ip"

echo "=== Resolved Paths ==="
echo "  PROJECT_ROOT : $PROJECT_ROOT"
echo "  SOC_CONFIG   : $SOC_CONFIG"
echo "  PDK_ROOT     : $PDK_ROOT"
echo "  NC_LIB_ROOT  : $NC_LIB_ROOT"
echo ""
echo "=== Verifying paths exist ==="
[ -f "$SOC_CONFIG" ]  && echo "  SOC_CONFIG  : OK" || echo "  SOC_CONFIG  : MISSING"
[ -d "$PDK_ROOT" ]    && echo "  PDK_ROOT    : OK" || echo "  PDK_ROOT    : MISSING"
[ -d "$NC_LIB_ROOT" ] && echo "  NC_LIB_ROOT : OK" || echo "  NC_LIB_ROOT : MISSING"
